content.text:
**What I did:**

1. Read `src/schema.mjs`, `src/accounts.mjs`, `src/queries.mjs`, and `tests/acceptance.test.mjs` to understand the codebase.

2. Updated `/Users/rom.iluz/Dev/sql-hidden-cost/benchmark/runs-enterprise-full/schema-evolution-enterprise/mongo/claude-code/repeat-3/workspace/src/schema.mjs` — added `preferredPaymentMethod` as an optional top-level property on the `accounts` collection validator with enum `["credit_card", "wire_transfer", "ach", "paypal"]` (line 22, after `createdAt`).

3. Updated `/Users/rom.iluz/Dev/sql-hidden-cost/benchmark/runs-enterprise-full/schema-evolution-enterprise/mongo/claude-code/repeat-3/workspace/src/queries.mjs` — added `preferredPaymentMethod: account?.preferredPaymentMethod` to the `getOrderSummary` return object.

4. `src/accounts.mjs` required no changes — the `updateAccount` function already uses `$set` with arbitrary data, so it handles `preferredPaymentMethod` generically.

5. `npm test` output: `Enterprise benchmark acceptance passed: mongo`

**Summary:** Added `preferredPaymentMethod` (optional string, enum: credit_card/wire_transfer/ach/paypal) to the accounts schema and included it in `getOrderSummary`. Tests pass. Committed as `0687ead`.
